items.title: Image Galleries
items.text: Create visual collections for your saved images. Organize them by themes, projects, or inspiration boards and browse everything in a clean gallery view.

items.title: AI-Powered Summaries
items.text: Don't have time to watch the whole video? Let our advanced AI generate concise summaries of YouTube videos, so you can grasp the key points in seconds.

items.title: Notes
items.text: Write quick notes while you browse and keep your ideas connected to each saved link. Capture key points, reminders, and thoughts in one place.

items.title: Read Articles
items.text: Save articles to read later in a distraction-free format. Focus on the content, highlight what matters, and return to your reading list anytime.

items.title: Watch Videos
items.text: Keep your video resources organized and ready to play whenever you need them. Build playlists for learning, work, or entertainment without losing track.
